meaning: n.船体中央部adj.船体中央的
examples: The paper optimizes the midship section structure of large crude oil tanker based on DNV rules.
The engineer and deck officers would be housed in midship deck house near the navigation bridge.
High flow midship pump. Up to 2250 GPM. The best selling single stage pump. Midship Split Drive Line Manifolded pump.
Most of the 23 public restrooms are working, said Cahill, along with some toilets in forward and midship cabins.
